name: Form breaks on edge cases
description: A profile edit form works on the happy path but users have reported: the form crashes when a username is 100 characters long, the avatar upload shows 'undefined' when the file picker is cancelled, the save button doesn't reflect loading state during a slow save, and long display names overflow the header on mobile.
expected_outcomes: Handles cancelled file picker (checks e.target.files[0] exists)
Enforces max name length (client + notes server validation needed)
Save button shows loading state (disabled + spinner/text)
try/catch around fetch with user-visible error message
Long display name truncates or wraps gracefully on mobile
